query:
SELECT 
  w.id as worker_id,
  w.name,
  a.id as avail_id,
  a.weekStartDate,
  a.weekEndDate,
  a.timeBlocks,
  a.confirmedAt,
  a.createdAt
FROM workers w
LEFT JOIN availability a ON w.id = a.workerId
WHERE w.name LIKE '%伊娜%'
ORDER BY a.createdAt DESC;
